name: Ivan Visconti

work.note: Official Sapienza sources identify him as Sapienza faculty and thesis supervisor.

tracking.note: Official Sapienza and university-hosted thesis sources provide explicit degree lineage and named doctoral-supervision evidence.

sources.note: Ranking page provides a DBLP author id and a current affiliation, but no lineage details.

The official Sapienza profile states that Ivan Visconti got his `Laurea (M.Sc. equivalent)` in 1998 and his `PhD in Computer Science in 2003 from Università di Salerno`, then was a `post-doctoral researcher in Paris, at the Département d'Informatique of the École Normale Supérieure`.
The official University of Salerno thesis front matter lists `SUPERVISOR: PROF. IVAN VISCONTI`.
Mathematics Genealogy Project cached profile used to populate missing PhD lineage fields in batch apply mode.

summary: Official Sapienza and university-hosted thesis sources state that Ivan Visconti earned his Laurea and PhD at the University of Salerno, later held a postdoctoral position at ENS Paris, and supervised a named doctoral thesis.

undergraduate.note: The reviewed official sources do not state a separate undergraduate institution for Ivan Visconti beyond the Laurea-equivalent degree.

masters.note: The official Sapienza profile states that Ivan Visconti got his `Laurea (M.Sc. equivalent) ... in 1998 ... from Università di Salerno`.

phd.note: The official Sapienza profile states that Ivan Visconti got his `PhD in Computer Science in 2003 from Università di Salerno`, but it does not name an advisor. Mathematics Genealogy Project also lists advisor(s): Giuseppe Persiano.

postdoc.note: The official Sapienza profile states that Ivan Visconti `has been a post-doctoral researcher in Paris, at the Département d'Informatique of the École Normale Supérieure`.
